title: Brood poultry
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Brood poultry demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for brooding

pcs.text: Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry breeding farm or facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry breeding farm or facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry breeding farm or facility.

pcs.text: Identify brood poultry age, quantity, housing requirements and tasks to be undertaken from work plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify brood poultry age, quantity, housing requirements and tasks to be undertaken from work plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify brood poultry age, quantity, housing requirements and tasks to be undertaken from work plan.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks for placing poultry and carrying out brooding tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks for placing poultry and carrying out brooding tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks for placing poultry and carrying out brooding tasks.

pcs.text: Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for placing poultry and carrying out brooding tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for placing poultry and carrying out brooding tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for placing poultry and carrying out brooding tasks.

pcs.text: Check shed and equipment are clean and set up correctly for placement of poultry and brooding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check shed and equipment are clean and set up correctly for placement of poultry and brooding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check shed and equipment are clean and set up correctly for placement of poultry and brooding.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for brooding

elements.title: Place poultry

pcs.text: Check and adjust feed, water and other shed conditions to meet brooding requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and adjust feed, water and other shed conditions to meet brooding requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and adjust feed, water and other shed conditions to meet brooding requirements.

pcs.text: Operate temperature and ventilation control equipment to achieve required conditions in designated housing prior to poultry placement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate temperature and ventilation control equipment to achieve required conditions in designated housing prior to poultry placement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate temperature and ventilation control equipment to achieve required conditions in designated housing prior to poultry placement.

pcs.text: Carry poultry containers safely and remove poultry from crates or boxes and place into designated housing using low stress bird handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry poultry containers safely and remove poultry from crates or boxes and place into designated housing using low stress bird handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry poultry containers safely and remove poultry from crates or boxes and place into designated housing using low stress bird handling techniques.

pcs.text: Monitor poultry behaviour and health regularly after placement, and adjust environment as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor poultry behaviour and health regularly after placement, and adjust environment as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor poultry behaviour and health regularly after placement, and adjust environment as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Place poultry

elements.title: Carry out brooding operations

pcs.text: Monitor poultry health and behaviour regularly according to enterprise  animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor poultry health and behaviour regularly according to enterprise  animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor poultry health and behaviour regularly according to enterprise  animal welfare requirements.

pcs.text: Check shed feeding and watering equipment, lighting, temperature, humidity and ventilation and litter condition regularly, and adjust according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check shed feeding and watering equipment, lighting, temperature, humidity and ventilation and litter condition regularly, and adjust according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check shed feeding and watering equipment, lighting, temperature, humidity and ventilation and litter condition regularly, and adjust according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and remove sick, injured or dead birds
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and remove sick, injured or dead birds?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and remove sick, injured or dead birds.

pcs.text: Extend brooding area or reduce bird density as birds grow
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Extend brooding area or reduce bird density as birds grow?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Extend brooding area or reduce bird density as birds grow.

pcs.text: Check, clean and adjust feeders, drinkers and other brooding equipment regularly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check, clean and adjust feeders, drinkers and other brooding equipment regularly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check, clean and adjust feeders, drinkers and other brooding equipment regularly.

pcs.text: Remove wet litter and replace as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove wet litter and replace as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove wet litter and replace as required.

pcs.text: Adjust lighting program and/or equipment as birds grow
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust lighting program and/or equipment as birds grow?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust lighting program and/or equipment as birds grow.

pcs.text: Carry out black-out training where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out black-out training where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out black-out training where required.

pcs.text: Monitor beak condition according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor beak condition according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor beak condition according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor body weight regularly against expected targets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor body weight regularly against expected targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor body weight regularly against expected targets.

pcs.text: Monitor feed and water consumption regularly, and adjust supply to meet enterprise program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor feed and water consumption regularly, and adjust supply to meet enterprise program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor feed and water consumption regularly, and adjust supply to meet enterprise program.

pcs.text: Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out brooding operations

elements.title: Undertake cleaning and reporting

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks for cleaning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks for cleaning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks for cleaning.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning.

pcs.text: Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Check and prepare cleaning equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and prepare cleaning equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare cleaning equipment.

pcs.text: Clean and/or sanitise work areas, tools, equipment and surfaces according to enterprise health, safety, personal hygiene and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and/or sanitise work areas, tools, equipment and surfaces according to enterprise health, safety, personal hygiene and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and/or sanitise work areas, tools, equipment and surfaces according to enterprise health, safety, personal hygiene and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Undertake cleaning and reporting

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
